final_rules.instructions: This rule uses a regex pattern to detect attempts where parts of the word 'script' and 'alert' are percent-encoded. It targets the case where attackers utilize various encodings to hide the script.
final_rules.rule: MainRule "rx:.*\x25[23]C[sS][rR](i[Pp]|\d)[tT].*\x25[23][Ee]ALErt\x25[23]81\x25[23]29.*" "msg:Detect encoded script alert XSS attempt" "mz:BODY|URL|ARGS" "s:$XSS:8" id:10001;

final_rules.instructions: The rule is created to match various encoded patterns that embed iframes with scripts attempting to execute JavaScript alert functions.
final_rules.rule: MainRule "rx:.*\x25[23]C[fF][rR][Aa][mM][Ee].*\x25[23]8[aAbB].*" "msg:Detect encoded iframe with obfuscated alert" "mz:BODY|URL|ARGS" "s:$XSS:8" id:10002;

final_rules.instructions: This rule targets SVG tags with JavaScript payloads embedded through encoding obfuscation techniques.
final_rules.rule: MainRule "rx:.*\x25[23]s[vV][gG].*\x25[23](D|d)j[aAvV][vV]aS(c|C)r[iI]pt.*" "msg:Detect encoded SVG with JavaScript obfuscation" "mz:BODY|URL|ARGS" "s:$XSS:8" id:10003;

final_rules.instructions: This rule captures attempts to utilize image tags with encoded sources triggering JavaScript execution via the onError event.
final_rules.rule: MainRule "rx:.*\x25[23][cCsSiI][iImM][gG].*(src|SRC).*\x25[23](D|d)(x|X).*onError.*" "msg:Detect encoded image src onerror XSS attempt" "mz:BODY|URL|ARGS" "s:$XSS:8" id:10004;

final_rules.instructions: Specific for detecting encoded SVG injections attempting to use onload events to trigger script execution.
final_rules.rule: MainRule "rx:.*\x25[23]s[vVgG][gG](/|\\).*(On[L|l]oad|ONLOAD).*" "msg:Detect encoded SVG onload event execution" "mz:BODY|URL|ARGS" "s:$XSS:8" id:10005;
